prompt: Create a two-panel meme. Panel 1 shows a happy group working together in the first image with the caption 'Group project in theory'. Panel 2 shows a tired student sleeping on books in the second image with the caption 'Group project in reality'. Use bold white meme text.
prompt_refined:
Generate a two-panel meme.
The left panel should depict a diverse group of people happily collaborating around a table, drawing visual inspiration from conditioning image 1. At the bottom of this panel, display the bold white meme text: 'Group project in theory'.
The right panel should show a student, visibly exhausted, sleeping face down on a stack of books at a desk, drawing visual inspiration from conditioning image 2. At the bottom of this panel, display the bold white meme text: 'Group project in reality'.
objects: Left panel depicting a diverse group of people
People happily collaborating around a table in the left panel
Bold white meme text: 'Group project in theory' at the bottom of the left panel
Right panel depicting an exhausted student
Student sleeping face down on a stack of books in the right panel
Bold white meme text: 'Group project in reality' at the bottom of the right panel
